qr-safety.title: QR Code Safety Tips for Indian Businesses
qr-safety.summary: Learn safe QR code practices for shops, restaurants, hotels and clinics before printing payment, review, WiFi or WhatsApp QR codes.
tips: Use official links and correct UPI IDs before printing.
Place QR codes where staff can see them.
Replace damaged or tampered stickers immediately.
Ask customers to confirm the business name before paying.

upi-qr-safety.title: UPI QR Safety Tips for Shops and Merchants
upi-qr-safety.summary: Simple UPI QR safety checks for Indian merchants using Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm and BHIM payments.
tips: Verify the payee name shown in the customer app.
Check the payment received notification before handing goods.
Do not paste QR stickers where strangers can easily cover them.
Keep a clean backup copy of your original QR code.

how-to-verify-upi-payment.title: How to Verify UPI Payment Received
how-to-verify-upi-payment.primary_keyword: How to Verify UPI Payment Received
how-to-verify-upi-payment.summary: A practical guide for shopkeepers, restaurants and small businesses to confirm Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm and BHIM payments safely.
tips: Check your own UPI app or bank SMS, not only the customer's screenshot.
Match the amount, time and sender name.
Do not hand over expensive items until payment is confirmed.
For failed or pending payments, ask the customer to retry instead of relying on screenshots.
